content: Engineered a distributed real-time messaging pipeline using Next.js, Node.js, and Redis Pub/Sub, scaling daily message throughput by 150% and reducing end-to-end latency to less than 50ms for 50,000+ concurrent active connections.

Architected database schema optimization and query caching strategies in PostgreSQL and Redis, lowering median query latency by 40% and cutting infrastructure server CPU utilization from 78% to 32% under peak workloads.

Spearheaded the redesign of the core dashboard interface using React, TailwindCSS, and Next.js App Router, resulting in a 35% improvement in Lighthouse performance scores and boosting user session duration by 22%.

Automated CI/CD deployment pipelines on AWS using GitHub Actions, Docker, and Kubernetes (EKS), reducing deployment cycle time by 75% and achieving zero-downtime rollouts across 4 production services.

Designed and implemented a customizable dashboard component library using Radix UI and TypeScript, decreasing frontend developer onboarding time by 30% and standardizing visual styling across 3 micro-frontend applications.

Refactored legacy Monolith architecture into Java Spring Boot microservices, improving system fault tolerance by isolating service failures and cutting overall AWS deployment billing cost by 18% via container right-sizing.
